The IMAT Sensei Offer

Everything You Need to Pass the IMAT.
Nothing You Don't.

This is not another generic course. Here's exactly what you get — and what it would cost you to get each piece separately:

📗

IMAT Biology Complete Guide

12 chapters, exam-focused theory, high-yield questions, cheat sheets & diagrams. Covers 100% of the IMAT Biology syllabus.

Value €29Included ✓
⚗️

IMAT Chemistry Complete Guide

Reaction maps, formula sheets, stoichiometry walkthroughs. The hardest IMAT section, made manageable.

Value €29Included ✓
⚡

IMAT Physics Complete Guide

5 focused chapters, formula reference cards, timed practice sets. Built to maximize points per hour of study.

Value €29Included ✓
📐

IMAT Mathematics Guide

The 7 highest-impact IMAT math topics. Formula cards, worked examples, IMAT-level questions with answer keys.

Value €29Included ✓
🧠

IMAT Logical Reasoning Guide

Logic maps, test simulations, pattern training. The section most students neglect — and where most points are won.

Value €29Included ✓
📅

15-Week IMAT Study Plan

Calendar-accurate, week-by-week preparation plan from May to August. You never have to wonder what to study next.

Value €19Included ✓

Calendar-accurate week-by-week preparation plan from May to August. Know exactly what to study every single day.

Value €19Included ✓
💬

WhatsApp Community + Q&A Support

Ask questions any time. Get answers from Yousaf and a community of students who are on the same journey.

Value €49Included ✓

Why Listen to Yousaf?

Built by Someone Who Has Lived This Journey

Most IMAT courses are sold by people who studied abroad or read books about it. IMAT Sensei is different. Yousaf Smaid has personally guided 150+ students through the IMAT process — from first study session to university enrollment in Italy.

Every book, every resource, every piece of advice comes from direct experience working with students, seeing where they struggle, and building the exact tools they needed to succeed.

Personalized mentorship
Direct WhatsApp access
Custom study plans
University selection help
Scholarship guidance
Proven IMAT strategies
Post-admission support
50+ free YouTube videos
Watch Free Videos ↗ Message Yousaf

FAQ

Common Questions

If your question isn't here, message Yousaf directly on WhatsApp.

How do I receive the books after purchasing? +
After payment, you'll receive your books as PDF files directly via WhatsApp within a few hours. Click any "Enroll" button on this page to start the process on WhatsApp.
When does the Final Revision Program start? +
The revision batch runs for 6 weeks from early August to September, timed specifically to peak with the IMAT exam date. Early Bird enrollment is open now and locks in the lowest price.
I'm a complete beginner. Are these books suitable for me? +
Yes. Every book starts from fundamentals and builds toward IMAT-level questions. Whether you last studied biology in school or haven't touched chemistry in years, the books are designed to bring you up to speed efficiently.
Can I buy just one book instead of the full bundle? +
Absolutely. Individual books are €19 each. The bundle of all 5 is €69, which saves you €26. Message on WhatsApp to specify which subjects you need.
How is this different from other IMAT prep courses? +
IMAT Sensei is built by someone who has worked directly with 150+ students going through this exact process. The materials are based on what actually appears in IMAT past papers, not generic science textbooks. You get direct access to Yousaf — not a faceless platform.
Is there support if I get stuck on something? +
Yes. Book buyers get access to the free WhatsApp community. Revision batch students get direct Q&A support with Yousaf during the program. You're never studying alone.

The IMAT is in September.
The Time to Start is Now.

Every week you delay is a week of preparation you can't get back. The students who get admitted started early, stayed consistent, and used the right resources.
